briefing.title: *Acuity Capital* — Series B narrative review.
briefing.summary: Saru opens the Series B review with the pricing slide; the room will ask about the option pool and the 1× non-participating preferred terms. Park is waiting on your cutoff date to pull the cohort table for slide 14.
briefing.suggested_followup: Confirm the 09:30 cutoff date for Park.

cards.title: Saru Patel · re: redline
cards.sub: You and Lin worked through the redline last night. Two loose ends remain — how large the option pool should be, and the 1× non-participating preferred terms. Both need answers before the 11:00 Zoom.

cards.title: Acuity — Series B narrative review
cards.sub: 45 minutes with Saru, Lin, and Park. You ended last call on the pricing slide; cohort table for slide 14 is still owed.

cards.title: Prep block — pricing slide & cohort table
cards.sub: Forty-five minutes to lock the numbers before Saru, Lin, and Park join the Zoom. You need a cutoff date confirmed by 09:30 so Park can pull the latest cohort data.

cards.title: Park Choi · Cohort table for slide 14
cards.sub: The cohort table for slide 14 is still missing. Park is ready to pull the latest numbers, but needs a cutoff date confirmed by 09:30.

cards.title: Q2 OKR draft — review when calmer
cards.sub: She's keeping the Q2 OKR draft warm so it doesn't vanish into the post-meeting fatigue. Tonight is yours.
